text: Amazon Machine Image (AMI) @ osstsmantia. @ s * AMI's can be used to launch EC2 instance ¢ AWS or Community Provided * Marketplace (can include commercial software) * Regional .. unique ID e.g. ami-0a887e401f7654935 * Permissions (Public, Your Account, Specific Accounts) ¢ You can create an AMI from an EC2 instance you want to template
